name: @page-context/bridge-extension
description: Page Context Bridge extension for exposing page-aware tools to MCP clients.

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @page-context/shared-protocol build && pnpm --filter @page-context/builtin-tools build && vite build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @page-context/shared-protocol build && pnpm --filter @page-context/builtin-tools build && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @page-context/shared-protocol build && pnpm --filter @page-context/builtin-tools build && pnpm --dir ../.. exec vitest run --project browser
